summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No merge is recommended because none has complete merge preflight proof, including current mergeability, resolved review-bot state, and a clean Codex /review. One narrow PR has an executable repair path; the remaining PRs need maintainer judgment or author/review follow-up before Clownfish can safely finalize them.

actions.reason: The PR is small and repairable on the contributor branch, but it cannot be merged until the failing behavior proof is fixed or rerun successfully and merge preflight is complete.

This may be repairable, but the failing checks plus unresolved historical Codex review-bot suggestions require maintainer or full review-thread judgment before merge or branch repair can be planned safely.
The PR crosses public SDK and session-state behavior with a large delta, which the job marks as a human-required class before Clownfish can recommend merge or replacement.
The broad session-state and generated/i18n-adjacent churn requires maintainer judgment before merge or a narrower repair/replacement plan.
The useful diagnostics surface is mixed with broad unrelated churn, so a maintainer needs to decide whether to request narrowing, split work, or authorize a replacement path.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the narrow MiniMax TTS request-shape PR #73079 on the contributor branch so behavior proof and merge preflight can be completed without replacing contributor work.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(minimax): request hex TTS output explicitly
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T073528-030.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/73079 by @efe-arv. Preserve attribution for the MiniMax request-shape fix.

Scope: keep the change limited to extensions/minimax/tts.ts and extensions/minimax/speech-provider.test.ts unless the failing behavior proof identifies a directly related MiniMax test harness issue.

Validation: pnpm vitest run extensions/minimax/speech-provider.test.ts; pnpm check:changed --base origin/main; rerun Real behavior proof before merge consideration.
